name: Hello Neighbor: Welcome to Raven Brooks
original_name: Hello Neighbor: Welcome to Raven Brooks
overview: New girl Trinity, moves across the street from creepy neighbor, Mr. Peterson. She joins Nicky & their less courageous friends on terrifying stealth missions to find out what horrific secrets are hiding in Peterson's horror house basement.

trailers.title: Welcome To Raven Brooks: Hello Neighbor Animated Series Teaser
